description: Style Note These shoes from fortune are a minimalist's reinterpretation of classic shoe styles. Wear these luxurious leather shoes with slim Fit formal shirts and trousers. Product Details Square toed black shoe with slip-on styling Padded inner with elasticated gussets at the sides of the tongue TPU outsole with an upraised heel and grooves all over Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner and polish or wax on leather parts Do not store in direct sunlight
